description: Curbline Properties Corp. is the owner and manager of convenience shopping centers. It is positioned on the curbline of well-trafficked intersections and major vehicular corridors in suburban, high household income communities. The Company is a self-managed real estate investment trust (REIT) that is publicly traded under on the NYSE.Curbline Properties Corp. was incorporated on October 25th, 2023 and is based in New York.
